name: codex-mcp-lazybundle
description: One-click MCP setup bundle for GitHub, Firebase, Obsidian, and NotebookLM across Codex, OpenCode, Claude Desktop, and generic mcp.json agents.

github.method: remote MCP reads GITHUB_PAT_TOKEN from local environment where supported; prefer gh auth login for normal git operations.
github.tokenPolicy: Never write the real GitHub token into repo files. Keep it in local environment variables or OS credential storage only.

firebase.method: firebase login; MCP command is npx.cmd -y firebase-tools@latest mcp
firebase.tokenPolicy: Do not use firebase login:ci or FIREBASE_TOKEN for normal local agent workflows.

obsidian.method: local Obsidian MCP/REST endpoint at http://127.0.0.1:27123/mcp/ reads OBSIDIAN_API_KEY from local environment where supported.
obsidian.tokenPolicy: Never write the real Obsidian API key into repo files.

notebooklm.method: run setup_auth once; browser login state is stored locally under %APPDATA%\notebooklm-mcp.
notebooklm.tokenPolicy: No manual token is stored in the bundle.

servers.auth: Uses firebase CLI login state. Run firebase login once per computer.
Run setup_auth once after the agent reloads; sign in in the Chrome window. Cookies are stored locally under %APPDATA%\notebooklm-mcp.
